name: the composite dispatch reports red and exit 1 when a required tool is absent (hard-fail)
command: printf 'resource "x" "y" {}\n' > main.tf && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file main.tf --tools checkov --required-tools checkov 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' e.txt && echo dispatch-red 1>&2
